description: Update the visual styles of the technical manual '/home/ga/Documents/omnibase_manual.docx' to match new branding guidelines. Modify the 'Normal' paragraph style to Liberation Serif, 11pt, Black/Auto and the 'Heading 1' style to Liberation Sans, 16pt, Dark Blue (#000080). Create a new paragraph style named 'WarningText' based on Normal with Italic and Red font, and apply it to the three paragraphs starting with 'WARNING:'. Clear all direct formatting from the document to ensure styles are applied correctly and save the result to '/home/ga/Documents/omnibase_rebranded.docx'.
